reviews.title: worst hotel ever
reviews.text: so me and my family stayed in this hotel for 4 days, so we got a savvy club card. but we couldnt use that card that much, and we had to pay extra charges, also all hotel receptionist and worders were really bad at englist, so whenever i want to say something or ask something, they gave me a wrong information and just hung out the phone calls. also it take so long time to do something. if i ask them a question, and they always said 'just momotent' and they took my time for so long. i didnt feel good about this. i dont want to go to this hotel any more.

reviews.title: I'm disappointed.
reviews.text:
Four adults visiting
1. Only kids are outside.
2. It's hard to book activities, and there are too many reasons to write for disclaimers, making conversation difficult.
3. Pool only for kids.
4. Even beach umbrellas have to be reserved, so it's more comfortable to just sit on the sandy beach when going out briefly.
reviews.room_type: Superior Coast View Twin Room for 3 People

reviews.title: Need to state clearly that Club Savvy is not part of this
reviews.text: There is no stating that Club Savvy benefit is not available through Agoda booking though some reviewers did mentioned that they had enjoyed the benefit. We had cancelled on another booking thinking that the kids will enjoy the benefits of Club Savvy thus we booked for 3 nights here. To our horror Club Savvy benefits was not available to us and we have to pay everything in full price. When we spoke with the reception, their only response is that they can’t do anything and that we just have to pay for everything. Unfortunately for us, the stay kick off with the wrong foot. Purpose of this reviewed to inform others on this. But if you are not out for Club Savvy benefits (then I don’t know why you will be choosing this hotel???) then I guess the pro to this is that all the other staff are friendly.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: If you want to book the water sport you need to stay at least 3 to 4 nights.

reviews.title: great for kids
reviews.text: the hotel itself is very old but they have so many activities for kids so if you are travelling with kids, then this is the choice
reviews.positives: dolphins encounter, many animals to play with and good waterslide indoor poor

reviews.title: It was very good, but...
reviews.text: The staff responded to various booking mistakes on our part, were kind to the children, and the activities were good. However, the facilities such as the pool and the restrooms outside the changing rooms felt quite old and seemed a bit lacking in cleanliness. The room looked clean, but I got bitten by bedbugs, so I became a bit concerned about the cleanliness…?

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Way over priced, all the restaurants are insanely over priced and all the facilities close extremely early.

reviews.title: Beach is nice
reviews.text:
Traditional fiv star hotel with a nice beach.
Nothing is exciting

reviews.title: Will not stay here again
reviews.text: The hotel charged us extra when my kids shared a bed the ages are 5 and 7 and the food was over priced there wasn’t any convenience store food available.

reviews.title: Good Hotel for Family
reviews.text: Nice hotel with good location and facilities, especially the dolphin experience

reviews.title: Good service and facility hotel
reviews.text:
Thier service is good, the facility is really good, the most attractive is there are dolphins, which can play with. But I hope the dolphins are kept by them respectfully, not only use dolphins to earn money. 

The only unhappy thing is the cleaniness of the hotel room. There is a huge cockroach in my room! Even that cockroach could make some noisy sound which woke me up at the midnight, so you can imagine how BIG the cockroach is!

reviews.title: Great gateway with kids
reviews.positives: many varieties of food, free valet parking when you arrive and shuttle when you leave, lots of programs to join

reviews.title: Disrespectful staff
reviews.text:
Incident happened on 16 April 2025 around 23:15pm where I ask a Male staff at the reception who wear scowl on his face. Never wanted to help me to take a photo, i felt disrespected. 
Luckily the female staff able to help me in the end.

reviews.title: Preliminary research is key.
reviews.text: I went with my 3-year-old and 7-year-old. I had heard that most activities could not be booked until the day of check-in, so I went without doing any research, but as a result, things ended up being quite chaotic. I think it's best to have some idea of the time and activities you want to do in advance.
reviews.room_type: Superior Twin Coast view (Club Savvy not applicable)

reviews.title: The resort is good for family trip who has child
reviews.text: I went with a my friend. It was almost good. But the room was little bit cold we requested to make out room get warm, but they couldn't do it. Except temp. everything was good. And I thought the resort is better family who has child than us.

reviews.title: Very relaxing stay in this hotel.
reviews.text: Nice and relaxing.
reviews.positives: The Sea, facilities and food.

reviews.title: Good service
reviews.positives: Room condition is good and comfortable ,staff friendly,

reviews.title: Breathtaking view
reviews.positives: Nice view, friendly staff

reviews.title: Deplorable conditions for otter
reviews.text: This review is mainly for the otter they have penned up. While the facilities though old were good and staff excellent, I cannot ignore the pitiful otter that is locked up in the tiniest pen with just a few body lengths of water available for swimming. Unacceptable. Anyone looking at it could see it was likely in distress repeatedly swimming the same pattern over and over and over.

reviews.title: very nice resort but everything need to charge additonal, suggest to stay over 3 nights, otherwise it's valuable
reviews.text: Very nice hotel with good fecilities, specially hotel owns dolphin and Stingray, kid are very interesting to see those Seabed organisms, but everything need to pay additonal charge, like sun umberlla, chair, hotspring, this is a bit pity, the price is around us$350 which feel very uncomfortable to extra

reviews.title: Good kind clean
reviews.positives: 4season restaurant depanyaki

reviews.title: Great resort for families
reviews.positives: lots of activities to join, clean, small yet nice beach

reviews.title: Good for young children
reviews.text: Overall it was okay. Before I booked the hotel, I have contacted the reservation about booking the dolphin programme but learnt that it can only book when we check-in. However, we asked in the dolphin counter on the 1st day when we check-in and still could not get in any of the programme with the dolphin, my daughter was very disappointed. We booked this hotel because we would like to join the Dolphin programme. I think the hotel should consider letting customer to book online before they check-in.
reviews.positives: Many activities for young children, warm indoor pool, slides for children

reviews.title: Good hotel for family with children
reviews.text:
We stayed in the hotel for 2 nights and tried to book the Dolphin activities once we arrived but they were already full for all dolphin activities for the 2 days (except the viewing dolphin's yard). My child was very disappointed. Suggestion: The booking system for dolphin activities should be opened once we book the hotel. 
Overall we love the hotel.
reviews.positives: There are many activities for young children, we especially love the swimming pool with slides. Also dolphin activities seems to be good too but we have no chance to experience as they are all full

reviews.title: Have beautiful view and good location
reviews.positives: Private beach

reviews.title: Renaissance Okinawa Resort
reviews.positives: nice beach, nice staff, nice view from the room

reviews.title: A well equipped hotel and many facilities. Good for family travel.
reviews.text: Good breakfast and many activities suit for different ages of kids

reviews.title: Good family stay
reviews.positives: Family oriented, small details surprise to the upside, with good family facilities

reviews.title: The best hotel that stayed in okinawa
reviews.text: The room is spacious and great ocean view . The breakfast in buffet or traditional Japanese are both great. Great place for those who are bringing their children for holidays . There are lots of famous destination along the road from the resort to the aquarium  where you can stop by and take the photo stop.
reviews.positives: The hotel is big and full of facilities , they even have their own dolphins

reviews.title: The best hotel for families with children.
reviews.text:
Cleanliness, facilities, activities
All the services are absolutely wonderful.
You can spend your entire stay at the hotel.
From marine activities on the private beach to the outdoor and indoor pools, which are available until 10 PM, the hotel's restaurant is also excellent! I was impressed by the fantastic quality of the Four Seasons breakfast buffet.
The various activities that can be booked at the hotel are also very appealing.
I was contemplating adding an extra bed for my child in a room with two single beds, but even though they were single beds, they were quite large—about the size of a double bed—and the room was very clean with a large sofa, providing a great level of comfort.
There is a self-laundry facility available 24 hours a day, complete with detergent, for washing and drying.
If I go to Okinawa again, I definitely want to stay here once more.
It is a bit pricey, but everything else is so perfect that even with the high cost, I would like to stay here again next time. I would be happier if it were a little cheaper.
reviews.room_type: Superior Twin Coast view (Club Savvy not applicable)

reviews.title: better for family holiday with kids.
reviews.text:
full range of facilities within the resort. but there isn't anything else for those who love to explore the area around. 

many activities to keep the kids engage. and wide range of marine life to keep you company. 

staff are friendly, always full of smile and always ready to assist

reviews.title: Nice spot for young kids
reviews.text: Great for young kids with an indoor and outdoor pool with water slides. Plenty of activities with dolphins, arts and crafts, boat trips, water sports, beach, trampoline, ping pong, etc. Decent options for dining.

reviews.title: It's good to go with a child.
reviews.text: Traveling with a baby makes it difficult to go to restaurants, but it was great that I could solve all my meals with the club service. There were so many activities to do that I felt short on time. The downside was that even if we paid for valet, it didn't work? It's the first time I've seen a place where valet options are not available for families with kids...

reviews.title: Travel destinations suitable for elementary school students
reviews.text: A hotel optimized for elementary school students. Dolphin experiences, various animals, a decent indoor pool, and a free laundry room are all good. However, having to pay for the umbrellas on the private beach is a significant drawback. The sunbed chairs are also charged per unit.

reviews.title: Activity paradise with kids.
reviews.text:
1. Riding a pirate ship, fighting with water and defeating enemies to find treasure
2. Riding a semi-submarine to explore underwater
3. Paddling a boat
4. Touching dolphins
5. Feeding various animals like rays and turtles
6. Taking a sunset yacht tour
These are the things we did during our 3-night, 4-day reservation.
We went with two kids aged 21 months and 41 months. I think they would have enjoyed it more if they were a bit older, but it still became a good memory! 

The downside is the bedding...
The price isn't cheap, and I understand that's because the activities are well organized and breakfast and lunch are provided, but the bedding made it uncomfortable to sleep, and I'm wondering if I should go back...

reviews.title: Hotel services
reviews.text: The hotel offers various activities such as a heated pool, canoeing, boats, and more. There are turtles and birds on the premises, as well as plans to see fish from the bottom of the boats. It's a great place to spend a relaxed day at the hotel even if you have small children. There are several dining options with a wide variety, so it's easy to overeat. The services provided depend on the room rank, so it's advisable to research the details when making a reservation.

reviews.title: The Dolphins worth it all
reviews.text: Though the accommodation is pricey compared to the rest, the facilities, the observant staff/life guards were on their toes at all time, which made it safe for young children wondering around.

reviews.title: Nice place but need the make reservations for acti
reviews.text: It's hard to make reservations for marine activities before our arrival because the hotel doesn't respond my email. So good luck for that
reviews.positives: Dolphins, activities

reviews.title: Best place for family with young children
reviews.text: Travelled with 7-year daughter and I was very satisfied with the children amenities and facilities. They offer 2 types of breakfast; american buffet style and Japanese set style (I prefer the latter.) This hotel is for family with young children but if you prefer relaxing and quiet travel, this is not the place.
reviews.positives: Cleanliness, kind staff, children friendly

reviews.title: It was a very comfortable stay.
reviews.text: Although I had small children with me, the activities and facilities for playing at the pool and the sea were plentiful, and the children really enjoyed the parrots, animals, and fish in the lobby. Additionally, there were a lot of laundry to do every day, but it was a great help that there was a washing machine available for free on the floor. Other hotels I stayed at charged for laundry and required going down to the first floor every time to use it, which was inconvenient. The souvenir selection was also very good, so I was able to purchase everything there and send it all together by mail.

reviews.title: Great experience.
reviews.text:
The room is clean and comfortable, one side has a beach view facing the hotel facilities, and the other side has a view of the broader coastline.

I stayed with the beach view, but there is another coastline view in the hallway. During the few days I was there, it was very windy, and the coastline view was even more magnificent.

The intimate interaction and shared swimming experience with the dolphins were amazing. Even in very cold weather (15 degrees + strong wind), the waterproof insulated swimsuits provided by the hotel made it possible to enjoy the experience without feeling too cold.

Overall, it was a very pleasant experience, and I would choose to come again next time.

reviews.title: Great for kids/family
reviews.text: Nearly everything about the Renaissance was worth paying for. Only negative, the beds were really hard.

reviews.title: Great for families with long stay
reviews.text: Facilities are great especially when you have the club savvy access, free onsen and club lounge and discounted activities
reviews.room_type: Superior Beach View Twin Room for 4 People

reviews.title: Great facilities and meals
reviews.text: Recommend for family vacation

reviews.title: Great family hotel
reviews.text: Awesome place for family. Many activities available at the resort. With club savvy some activities are free  and lunch is provided too. Washing machine available to use for free. Service is great. My Son had a great time !

reviews.title: Return visit
reviews.text:
The price is a bit steep, but the view is magnificent from the room. Very good atmosphere at the hotel and packed of activities. Restaurant is crowded and needs to wait for the table. I wish there will be more variety of choices for the buffet as the dishes are more or less the same compared to 3 years ago when I first visited. 
In general, the hotel is ideal for family with young children. Very warm and friendly resort.

reviews.title: Great experience at Renaissance Okinawa
reviews.text:
It's a great experience spending Christmas time at Renaissance Okinawa. The room is clean and spacious with excellent seaview. 

We are greeted by very polite staffs whereever we go and the staffs are trying their best to provide service to us and being helpful where possible. 

My husband and I enjoy the food at the Japanese restaurant a lot, it is a fantastic experience at  reasonable price. 

We are particularly happy to join the dolphin program in the morning during the winter time. We had the chance to interact with the Dolphins by giving instruction to them. The staffs are being very friendly and able to clearly explain the instruction to us in English. 

We will definitely come back for another stay during summer soon to try out more water activities. We have a great time at Renaissance Okinawa and highly recommend it to our friends and family.

reviews.title: Very Good Hotel
reviews.text: Very good hotel with a lot of marine activities, staff were very nice and friendly.

reviews.title: must stay hotel
reviews.positives: the dolphins arw great

reviews.title: Wonderful Hotel in Okinawa
reviews.text:
This is the second time we visited to this hotel,

- good location to south part or north part
- nice breakfasts
- many activities no matter in beach, with sea animals or hotel ( like cake, hamburger) 
- dolphin activities staffs are professional , especially the cute lady. She introduced the relations for food chains for dolphin and assisted us to finish the swim with dolphin .  The photographer take nice photos. 
- cool kid activities with paper , scrissor, stone …. They like the toy much =]
reviews.room_type: Superior Coast View Twin Room - No Long Stay Benefit

reviews.title: I am satisfied!
reviews.text: I'm leaving to create joyful memories with my elementary school child^^
reviews.room_type: Superior Coast View Twin Room for 4 People

reviews.title: Great hotel to stay.
reviews.text: all are super satisfactory

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Everything is top level! My child loved the turtle melon bread for breakfast and ate it every day! I enjoyed plenty of sea grapes every day and fully immersed myself in everything Okinawa has to offer!

reviews.title: Christmas
reviews.text: With Christmas approaching, Santa is here! Many people greeted the parrot at the hotel with "Good morning," and the parrot responded happily! The children had a great time, and the adults were very satisfied and delighted!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Lots of activities and animals at the resort

reviews.title: Really enough.
reviews.text: The price range is a bit high, but the facilities are worth it, truly providing a good experience. I had a really great time here.

reviews.title: Family-friendly resort hotel
reviews.text: A wonderful hotel that is perfect for families with small children, highly recommended.

reviews.title: Classe
reviews.positives: La chambre est très spacieuse et tout est de qualité !
reviews.negatives: Il faut attendre longtemps le matin pour le petit-déjeuner.

reviews.title: On the honeymoon.
reviews.text: It was a very wonderful honeymoon. The hotel allows you to fully enjoy nature. You can enjoy activities, and just walking outside is fun. No matter which restaurant you choose, the food was incredibly delicious. In particular, the hospitality at Umikaze was outstanding. I would love to stay again.

reviews.title: It turned out to be a wonderful family trip.
reviews.text: It was a family trip for 3 nights and 4 days with my 4-year-old and 8-year-old children. We were completely satisfied with both the service and activities. The older child really enjoyed the treasure hunting and it has become a memorable experience for them. The indoor pool was geared towards younger children. I think it's better for elementary school students to focus on activities. Since there are benefits with Club Savvy, I recommend staying for more than 3 nights.

reviews.title: Erholsam und entspannt
reviews.positives: Sehr freundliches Personal, bietet viele Möglichkeiten. sehr gut auch für Familien mit Kinder. Vielfältiges Restaurant Angebot. Speziell zu empfehlen ist das Anvil Reataurant: Hervorragende Küche, Zubereitung, Service. Beeindruckendes Weinangebot.
reviews.negatives:
Nichts.
Zum Strand Malibu Beach: der öffentliche Teil ist nicht besonders gepflegt. Der hoteleigene Strand ist dagegen sehr schön.

reviews.title: No complaints.
reviews.text: We went on a family trip with our 4-year-old and 3-year-old children. The hotel had so many enjoyable activities for the kids that they seemed sad to leave during checkout. We also combined two large beds, so even the kids, who have a tendency to move around in their sleep, were able to sleep comfortably.

reviews.title: This is hot information I recently received.
reviews.text: This is our second time at the Renaissance Okinawa Resort. First of all, if you join the Savy Club, it will be a wonderful family trip at the hotel. Savy offers free breakfast and lunch, and meals are available at various places. Activities can be enjoyed at a 50% discount off the regular price. In the past, this was also free, but now a certain amount needs to be paid. However, I highly recommend the boats or yachts. You can see wild fish directly. It's the best for a family trip.

reviews.title: Second-generation wedding ceremony.
reviews.text: 27 years ago, my husband and I had our wedding at the chapel of the Renaissance Resort Okinawa, and now our son and his wife also held their wedding there. We were able to spend such a happy time in the chapel with a view of the horizon stretching endlessly, thanks to the staff. The chapel is located on the premises, and there are animals like birds, dolphins, rays, and starfish, along with a private beach, pool, and table tennis, making it possible to enjoy the hotel grounds for an entire day.

reviews.title: Best resort for kids
reviews.text: Best amazing resort for kids with everything you could possibly ask for. Small petting zoo, sand, swimming, dolphins, manta ray, beach. Best recipe for a great family holiday

reviews.title: Return visit
reviews.text: Always nice and warm at this hotel. Comfortable and good atmosphere[here

reviews.title: サービスが悪い
reviews.negatives: フロントが電話に出なかった

reviews.title: Really good for family vacation with children
reviews.text: Beautiful ocean, pool, play room and excellent breakfast bread.

reviews.title: 観光地慣れしたリゾートホテルという印象
reviews.positives: 部屋がきれいだった。
reviews.negatives:
リゾートホテルなのにユニットバスだったのが残念。
ホテルの売店でブルーシールのアイス（小）がハーゲンダッツ並みの価格で、商売魂を感じた。

reviews.title: perfect place for family
reviews.text: the best indoor pool for unexpected weather condition.  it opens as late as 10PM.  other hotels usually have indoor pool close at night.  casual eat out place near outdoor pool was easy and convenient for family with kids.  highly recommended.

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text: Excellent!!
reviews.positives: Staff, accommodations, activities

reviews.title: Irma
reviews.text: Prima hotel. Het is eigenlijk een hotel waar vakantiegangers komen met jonge  kinderen. Wil men een rustige omgeving dan is dit hotel minder geschikt.

reviews.title: ビーチビューのはずが・・・
reviews.text:
海を見ながらゆっくり過ごしたいとビーチビューのお部屋を指定してGWに予約しました。
それなのに、建物の屋根が邪魔してビーチが見えないお部屋でした。屋根も清潔な状態ではなかったので部屋の変更を相談しましたが、追加料金がかかるということで納得がいかず、葛藤の中そのまま宿泊しました。
更にもう一つ残念なことがありました。娘がイルカと遊びたいとアクティビティの予約をしましたが雨がひどく雷注意報も出ていました。しかし、日時変更には通常通りキャンセル料が必要ということ。大雨&不安の中の参加で楽しめませんでした。（事故なく終了しましたが）

今回の旅行を否定してしまうことになるので、本当はコメントはしたくなかったのですが、旅行から少し時間が空いたので今後の改善を期待し書き込みます。

reviews.title: お子様連れには良さそう
reviews.text:
ホテルにはお子様連れが沢山。アクティビティーもご家族向けが充実している感じ。一方、年齢制限を設けているレストランもあり、ゆっくり大人の時間を過ごすことも出来、一定の満足度を得ることは出来ました。
ただ、パーキングサービスは到着時の1回のみ。その1回目も自動車を取に行ってもらっている間、暑い外のベンチで待つように促されて不満を感じました。
あと部屋の掃除。ビーチで遊んだ後、部屋のシャワーをしっかり浴びてから18:30に予約しているレストランで食事をしようと思って17:30頃部屋に戻るとまだ掃除中。どのくらいかかるか聞いてみると30分との事。食事前のシャワーは諦めました。
ちょっとしたことですが、このホテルはもう使わないな、と思いました。

reviews.title: 子供連れのファミリー向けリゾート
reviews.text:
2歳の娘を連れ家族で宿泊しました。ホテルには、プライベートビーチ、プール、アクティビティーとコンパクトにまとまっていて小さな子供が居る場合、移動が大変なのでその点、このホテルは便利です。
ただその反面、スタッフ対応やサービスに疑問を思うところが多々ありました。
どの部署もスタッフも丁寧な接客をしているのですが、反面客捌きが悪く何処でも待たされてばかりでストレスが溜まります。
レストランなどは、開店時お客さんが予約を含め2-30組待っているのに1組づつバカ丁寧な案内で席まで案内し順番待ちしている側は、長時間待たされて最悪でした。待ってるうちにお腹を空かせた子供がぐずってしまい可哀想です。レストランの開店時間も昼夜とも遅めで子供のペースに合わせて時間をコントロール出来ません。
色々なリゾートに泊まりましたがココは、設備やロケーションなどハードはともかくソフト面は、料金に見合わないと思いました。

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
朝食で、洋食と和食をはしごできたのが、嬉しかったです。
ただ、2泊の連泊だったのですが、山田温泉♨️にはいれないのが、残念でした。

reviews.title: ホテルは広いが部屋のお風呂がトイレと同じところにあって少し使いにくい。
reviews.text: 外でのアクティビティは充実しているものの、ホテルの設備が少し古いように感じた。また駐車場も少し遠く、不便さを感じた。お風呂も有料なので入らなかった。プールは楽しめた。

reviews.title: いい思い出でした。
reviews.text: イルカのふれあいできて、嬉しかったです。フロントの対応は感じ良くなかった、作り親切感がすごくわかる

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
フロントの方々とても良い方でした。
ベトナム人の女性の方がいましたが、
親切な方でした。

reviews.title: great for families
reviews.text: amazing activities for families, not recommended for couples on singles. Rooms are a little tired. Good facilities although aging.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 景色もよく、大変良かった。

reviews.title: 小さな子連れに最適
reviews.text: キレイなプライベートビーチ、外と中のプール、中のプールにはスライダーあり、いずれも大きくはないですが小さな子連れにはとてもよかったです。スタッフの方は人によって対応のよさは異なりました。

reviews.title: 家族連れにはオススメ
reviews.text:
また行きたいと思えるホテル
2歳の子供と妻と宿泊。

不便に感じた点
・冷凍庫が部屋にない
・アクティビティの予約が取りづらい

reviews.title: 大人も子供も楽しめるリゾート
reviews.text:
子供を遊ばせるのには絶好のリゾート
スタッフの皆さんが忙しいのに子供とじゃんけん✊✌️✋をしてる姿が印象的だった

reviews.title: アクティビティが多い
reviews.text: お値段はそこそこしますが、このホテルだけで沖縄ん満喫できるような素敵な場所でした！

reviews.title: 子供は大満足
reviews.text: ジャンケンスタンプラリーに7歳4歳の息子達は大満足でした。ホテル内でイルカと触れ合えたり、幼児向けプールやたくさんのアクティビティもあって効率的に遊べました。混んでいて希望のアクティビティに参加できなかったのが残念です。イルカやエイと泳ぐアクティビティに参加してみたかったです。あと、リニューアルを大々的に謳っていたと思うのですが、5年前との違いはフロントの背景以外、分かりませんでした。

reviews.title: さいこ！
reviews.text: さいこ！

reviews.title: 快適。

reviews.title: ที่พักสะอาด สวยงาม มีกิจกรรมทางน้ำครบ(มีค่าใช้จ่ายเพิ่ม)

reviews.title: 楽しかった
reviews.positives: イルカや亀と触れ合えた
reviews.negatives: 部屋からエレベーターが遠かった

reviews.title: ที่พักติดหาด มีกิจกรรมทางน้ำ เหมาะสำหรับครอบครัวที่มีเด็กเล็ก
reviews.text: ทำเลดี มีชายหาดส่วนตัว มีจุดชมพระอาทิตย์ตก มีกิจกรรมทางน้ำให้เลือกเล่นได้เยอะ(มีค่าใช้จ่ายเพิ่มเติม)มีกิจกรรมให้เด็กเยอะ เหมาะกับครอบครัวที่มีเด็กเล็ก ห้องพักกว้างสะอาด สบาย วิวจากห้องมองเห็นทะเล อาหารเช้าไม่ค่อยอร่อย รวมๆแล้วประทับใจ

reviews.title: 地點遠！清潔度差！員工不懂幫客人解決問題！
reviews.text:
我覺得被高估了/ 酒店比想像中差。
房間清潔差，有床蝨！令到我皮膚十分敏感和痕癢！員工英文差！原本入住三日，最後取消二日！十分失望！破壞了我們的Honeymoon!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: 性價比低，很多員工不懂英語或國語，溝通有問題

reviews.title: 性价比很一般
reviews.text: 对非日本游客不友好，很多menu连英文翻译都没有，员工英语普遍都不太好。因为无法英语沟通，很多报名参加的活动都没办法参与。并且分给我一个位置很差的房间，在冷却塔和厨房排烟机上面，我想肯定是把好位置留给了日本客人。现场又收了5400一晚的儿童税金，孩子4岁。。。下次再去冲绳不会再考虑。

reviews.title: 酒店設施多元化，但房間很殘舊
reviews.text: 房間太殘舊，完全係80年代嘅裝修風格
reviews.positives: 有海豚玩，私人沙灘，靚景

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.positives: 有點舊

reviews.title: 適合一家大細之酒店
reviews.text: 景觀環境非常好、一踏出酒店就是海灘，而且還有室內外泳池，還提供多項水上活動，基本不用離開酒店呀，而且有免費代客泊車，還有如果連續住3晚或以上，可以到特定餐廳享用早餐，食物質素及環境比一般住客用的來得好，而且還提供免費温泉及享用club lounge服裝，所以建議如果要入住的話可住多幾晚
reviews.positives: 舒適、房間大、職員有善

reviews.title: 舒適
reviews.positives: 整潔， 水上活動，海豚

reviews.title: 已經第4次入住. 仍然保持水準
reviews.positives: 我們已經是第4次入住. 仍然保持水準 . 度假真係唔錯.

reviews.title: 渡假一流的酒店
reviews.text: 下次再到沖繩會繼續選擇此酒店
reviews.positives: 環境優美，海景沙灘泳池齊全，空間大

reviews.title: 綜合大致良好，唯獨是地點不方便
reviews.positives: 酒店內沙灘水上玩樂設備一流，員工親切有善，海景房間景色一絕

reviews.title: 非常好的酒店!
reviews.text: 酒店漂亮,有多種海洋生物,房間舒適,下一次會再入住.
reviews.positives: 酒店漂亮,有多種海洋生物,房間舒適

reviews.title: 水上設施完善
reviews.positives: 房間極舒服 美麗海景 水上活動

reviews.title: 満足
reviews.positives: ロケーションがよく、また、訪れたいです
reviews.negatives: 駐車場が歩いていくので、子どもをつれては。たいへんでした

reviews.title: 酒店內服務
reviews.positives: 1. 能夠可以親親海豚很美好回憶，2.浮潛導師帶我們浮潛，浮潛器材很乾淨同帶領我們出海感到很安全 3. 設有免費洗衣服務很貼心服務

reviews.title: nice view
reviews.text: sea view. welcome drink offered. All staff were helpful throughout the wedding and the accomodation.

reviews.title: 돈 밖에 모르는 르네상스 호텔
reviews.text:
체크아웃 할때 일본엔화 70,600엔을 더 지불하라고 한다.
이유는 내가 일본어를 모르는 한국 사람이기 때문에...
이핑계 저 핑계를 대면서 무조건 더 지불하라고 한다.
비행시간 늦어서 빨리가야 하는데 돈 내지 않으면 못간다고 하며 돈 더달라고 함..
30여분간 실랑이 끝에 내가 끝까지 버티자 결국 그냥 가라고 함..
난 겨우 2틀밤을 쉬면서 1440달러와 인펀트 추가 비용 엔화 18,000엔 을 모두 지불하였지만 그들은  엔화로 대략 7만엔을 더 내야 한다며 말도 안되는 소리함..
내가 매니져 이름 물어보고 크레임 하겠다고 하자 나중에는 그냥 보내줌..

두 번 다시 안간다..

reviews.title: 아이들의 천국
reviews.text: 환상적인 비치와 리조트의 볼거리는 최고!뷔페도 굿!

reviews.title: 가족여행 오키나와 르네상스에서
reviews.text:
가격이 너무 비싸다
체크아웃 시간을 늦출수 없어 불편햇다
안내책자에 일어만 있어 못알아보겟다
엘리베이터에서 동선이 너무 멀다
실내가 전체적으로 어둡다
새벽일정 고객을 위해 도시락 서비스가  좋았다
실내 실외 수영장 슬라이드 길이가 너무 짧고 밋밋하여 금방 실증느낀다 유아들이
주변 골프장과의 부킹 연결 프로그램 있엇음 좋겟다
주차장과의 거리가 너무멀다
직원들은 대체적으로 친절
한국어 잘하는직원 더필요
reviews.positives: 1.유아용 실내수영장 2.가까운해변  3.다채로운 음식

reviews.title: 사비카드는 꼭
reviews.text:
리조트 는 여러가지 전부 만족 합니다만 사비 카드가 있다는 전제 하에서 좋습니다. 
사비 카드가 없다면 가성비가 좋다고 볼수 없네요 
가격이 무지 비싼 편입니다.
그렇지만 리조트의 엑티비티 및 레스토랑은 매우 만족 스러웠습니다.

reviews.title: 좋아요
reviews.text: 국제거리에서 차로 42분 정도의 위치에 있으며.주변에 아무것도 없음.호텔외의 슈퍼나 음식점을 이용하려면 차로 10분정도 나가야 시내로 나갈수있음. 호텔과 연결된 바다에서 레져도 있고,스노우쿨링도 가능하고, 많지는 않지만 열대어도 관찰되어 너무 만족스러웠음^^열대어 엄청많은 푸른동굴은 차로 3분내로 갈수있어 너무너무너무너무 좋았어요^^푸른동굴에서 스노우쿨링 살다시피 하여 호텔과 연결된 바다는 별로 안감ㅋ 주차공간은 넓고, 멀리있는경우 셔틀로 데려다주며 주차비는 없음.조식은 대기 50분은 사실인듯(1층 메인만 한번이용)ㅡ.ㅡ 맛과 종류는 5점만점에 3.9점.새로 생긴 건물이라 호텔 안과 오션뷰는 엄청 깨끗하고, 엄청 넓고, 시설이나 깨끗함은  너무너무 좋았어요. 방에  들어가자마자 감탄사가 절로나옴. 돌고래는 밖어서 보이긴하지만 돌고래를 만지거나 근처에 가려면 요금이 비싸서 그런지 이용하는 사람은 못봤음.

reviews.title: 결혼기념일
reviews.text:
결혼기념일 여행을 오키나와로 다녀왔습니다.
오래된 리조트 느낌이 났지만 내부는 깨끗했고,
직원들은 친절했으나 영어가 능숙치 않았습니다.
레크레이션 프로그램이 잘 갖춰져 있었으나, 대부분 밖에서 즐기는 것들이라 날씨에 크게 영향을 받았습니다.
대체로 즐거운 여행이었습니다.

reviews.title: 편안함과 즐길거리의 리조트
reviews.text: 다양한 부대시설과 볼거리,먹거리로 전혀 지루하지 않게 보내서 좋았습니다.
reviews.positives: 다양한 부대시설및 이벤트,룸컨디션,친절한직원

reviews.title: 아이들의 호텔
reviews.text: 3~8세정도 아이들을 동반가족 호텔로 최고입니다.직원들친절하고 호텔도 깨끗해서 만족합니다

reviews.title: 르네상스 부대시설은 최고예요
reviews.text: 리조트에서만 할수있는게 많아요~ㅣ박만하는거라 사비혜택못받아서 코랄크루즈만

reviews.title: 나이스뷰 & 깔끔한 내부
reviews.text: 이만한 가격에 이만한 뷰와 내부 인테리어, 조식, 룸 상태면 매우 훌륭한 편b

reviews.title: 거대한 규모의 리조트
reviews.text:
큰 규모만큼 갖춘 것도 많고 할 것도 많은 좋은 리조트. 넓고 깔끔하고 친절한 호텔 경험.
다만 주차 문제는 정말 불만족스럽습니다.

reviews.title: 좋았어요
reviews.text: 아이데리고 가기 최고였어요. 그립네요

reviews.title: 아동 동반 최고
reviews.text: 다음에도 다시 이용하고싶어요

reviews.title: 최고의 신혼여행이였어요.
reviews.text: 식사 숙박 부대시설 모든 것이 완벽했습니다. 다만, 렌트카가 없으면 중부여서 이동이 힘듭니다.

reviews.title: 最高！
reviews.positives: スタッフの方々が笑顔で丁寧に対応してくださいました。

reviews.title: 차 렌트꼭하세요
reviews.text: 차 렌트 꼭 하세요.차 없으면 리조트 밖에  가까운식당이 한 두 군데 밖에 없습니다. 리조트안에 식당이7군데나있지만 모두 굉장히 비싸요.  스노클링 및 해상스포츠는 3월이후에 개장하니까 (2월엔 물에들어가기가 추워요)참고하시구요. 프라이빗 비치,돌고래,편의점(간단한스넥과음료과자정도만있어요.)차렌트를못한분들은 안내데스크에 자전거대여를 부탁하면 대여점에서 다음날 리조트로 가져와준다고합니다. 비용은모르겠네요. 자전거 대여점을 걸어가려면 한시간반걸려요.방은깨끗하고 뷰가끝내줍니다

reviews.title: 旅は天気次第！
reviews.positives:
部屋の広さ　
アメニティグッズなど
reviews.negatives: 山田温泉楽しみにしてましたが入浴料金があるとはびっくりしました

reviews.title: 완벽한 가족여행지
reviews.text: 위치, 음식, 프로그램 모든게 최고

reviews.title: 朝食パインデニッシュ美味しいよ！
reviews.positives:
朝食のブュッフェのデニッシュが美味しかったです！
そして朝に出勤してくるとりさん達が可愛かったです^_^
reviews.negatives: 第二駐車場停めずらい

reviews.title: 싸비클럽이용했어요.
reviews.text: 3박을해서 싸비 클럽으로 조삭 중식 모두 무료로 이용했어요. 좋아요

reviews.title: 最高！また来たい。
reviews.positives: アクティビティが多く、子供との旅行にすごくよかった。

reviews.title: 아이 동반 가족을 위한 최고의 리조트
reviews.text: 아이 동반 가족에게는 최고의 리조트

reviews.title: 5살아아와함께 너무 좋은 호텔
reviews.text: 5살아아와함께 너무 좋은 리조트였습니다

reviews.title: 최고의 호텔
reviews.text: 정말 최고의호텔입니다. 아침 세번먹었습니다. 호텔안에있는 레스토랑보다 밖이 맛있는곳이 없네요. 저는 3박이상해서 사비카드로 아침점심 다먹고 저녁만 밖에 나가 사먹었어요. 그냥 수영하다 사비로 엑티비티하다 온천하고 그냥 호텔에만 있어도 여행온듯한 모든것을 누릴수 있는곳이네요. 남편이 매년 여기만 오자고~~ 먹는거 노는거 제한없이 할수있으니 여유있는 여행이 되었습니다. 정말 너무 좋아요!

reviews.title: 최고입니다.
reviews.text: 르네상스때문에 일번 가고싶어집니다.

reviews.title: 강추
reviews.text:
강추.호텔에서 모든것을. 해결할수있음.
유아동반ㆍ가족동반에 매우 만족.

reviews.title: 너무나 만족스러웠습니다
reviews.text:
또 이용하고 싶을 정도로 만족하고 돌아갑니다 
저녁에 테라스에 앉아서 바닷바람 쐬는 것도 좋았고, 뷔페 다양하고 돌고래도 키우니 구경하기 좋아요~

reviews.title: 호텔에만 있어도 충분히 즐거운 여행이었네요~
reviews.text:
오키나와 3박4일이시면 사비클럽이용 꼭 하시고 굳이 렌트카빌려서 밖에 안나가도 충분히 재미지게 놀수 있습니다~ 편안하고 쾌적한 여행이었습니다~
돌고래들이 쉬는 공간이 너무 좁아서 맘이 아픈거 빼면...다 좋은 여행이었네요~ 르네상스리조트꼭 다시 가보고 싶습니다~

reviews.title: 酒店的海滩不错，服务比较好
reviews.text: 酒店的海滩不错，风景优美，网络一般，时有时无。酒店的早餐人太多了，还要排队。针对入住三个晚上以上的会有一个club 卡送，可以免费玩一些海上项目，spa等。总体还不错，性价比不是特别好，价格有些贵。酒店的工作人员比较热情，英语一般。酒店入住的客人大部分是日本人。
reviews.positives: 服务

reviews.title: 很棒的亲子酒店
reviews.text: 非常适合带小孩子去住，除了位置略偏周边吃的选择较少之外，其他都很赞，酒店给我的感觉也不是太旧，服务是非常棒的

reviews.title: 非常满意，超出预期！
reviews.text: 服务仔细周到，洗衣房方便，食物很不错，很多动物，海豚项目超赞

reviews.title: 非常不错
reviews.text: 非常不错的体验，我们这次有婴幼儿及大童，都可以找到玩的地方。适合呆在酒店

reviews.title: 對非日本人不方便
reviews.text: 只有日文説明及員工英文能力不足溝通

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: 孩子們很喜歡,因為有上下舖可以睡,還有海豚可以玩(自費),但飯店有點舊,員工英文不太好,餐廳的餐普普.

reviews.title: 裡頭有4天3夜套包會比較划算，只住一二天的，享受不到那些福利
reviews.text: 活動相當多，但浴室沒有窗戶，也偏小，帶小小孩不方便
reviews.positives: 服務好

reviews.title: 飯店最令人驚豔的是現榨果汁
reviews.text: 很難預約的海豚表演，對於只住一晚或是自住行較晚Check In的住戶相當不便利，此飯店唯一也是最大賣點
reviews.positives: 大廳有不關在籠子的鸚鵡

reviews.title: 從機場開過去還是要一段路
reviews.text: 裡面的設施還不錯

reviews.title: 風景美
reviews.text: 大致上喜歡,只有退房後仍留在海灘時需要付費租用海灘傘與海灘椅,這點對已經住房的客人來說不太合理~~
reviews.positives: 海灘景點棒

reviews.title: 很棒的體驗
reviews.text:
房間、設施、餐飲都非常棒
多樣化的設施可以在飯店玩一整天

reviews.title: 近乎完美，除了價格不美麗之外
reviews.positives: 食物好吃、海景超美、很有渡假氣息

reviews.title: 親子飯店很推薦，無論是戶外活動或是飯店內人員，都很專業和善親切！
reviews.positives: 員工禮貌客氣，餐點選擇多樣化，而且對小朋友非常友善並且非常安全，救生員都非常專心在顧小孩！很多餐廳做選擇，並且都很美味！
reviews.negatives: 附近較少商店，但基本上飯店內賣點已經很充足！

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 飯店設施及餐廳都很棒

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 游玩的项目多

reviews.title: Paid extra money not to be here. It was awful
reviews.positives: Nothing. The hotel was the worst experience I’ve had.
reviews.negatives:
The hotel is far from ‘luxury’ experience. The price we paid and what we got did not match! Moved to Hyatt straight away ( which was also cheaper!)
The outdoor swimming pool is in terrible condition 
The food is sub-par and overpriced
The stuff barely speaks any English 
The hotel is not suitable for couples/ people without kids - it is literally a kids park , very noisy
They hold animals in tiny cages - someone needs to check for animal cruelty
We had to pay a penalty of one extra night stay to get away from this place - and it was worth it! I would pay money not to be there

reviews.title: Comfy chill stay
reviews.positives: Breakfast was great / rooms are comfortable
reviews.negatives: Beach / pool sunbeds doesn’t have mattress, but I guess it is not very common in Japan as you don’t stay too long in the sun

reviews.title: Very nice, comfortable hotel
reviews.positives: Really lovely property and staff. Location was a little remote so couldn’t really do much nearby. Spa was well worth the visit, felt like I’d been in there for hours!
reviews.negatives: Paid water sports activities only seemed to last 5-10 mins.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wonderful staff, excellent food, clean facilities and a great place to stay with kids with an exciting array of activities for the whole family. I highly recommend and would stay again!

reviews.title: Manpower is undeniably the secret weapon of Renaissance Okinawa Resort.
reviews.positives: Top notch staff members.  We felt how top management really cares for the customers.
reviews.negatives: The water from where the sea lion was, was flowing to the outside pool.  We found that very unsanitary.
